examples: Intoxication interferes with speech and coordination.
Intoxication interferes with memory and thinking, speech and coordination.
They speak of the sky-pervading sorrow which lowers in the darkness of clouds; the speechless deep intoxication of the forest-roaming spring.
Cambridge researchers determined that feeling good from eating and drug intoxication are different things.
Travis also was arrested last February in Denton County, northwest of Dallas, for public intoxication.
